hero.title: Taste the Tradition
hero.subtitle: Authentic Serbian & Russian cuisine crafted with passion, served with elegance in the heart of Belgrade.

featured.title: Featured Dishes
featured.subtitle: Our chef's selection of signature creations

dish1.name: Ćevapčići Royale
dish1.description: Hand-formed beef and lamb rolls with smoked paprika aioli and charred onion relish.

dish2.name: Danube Salmon
dish2.description: Pan-seared fillet with golden beurre blanc, dill, and seasonal vegetables.

dish3.name: Chocolate Fondant
dish3.description: Rich dark chocolate cake with molten center, fresh berries, and vanilla gelato.

dish4.name: Belgrade Goulash
dish4.description: Slow-braised beef in a rich paprika broth with root vegetables and fresh herbs.

items.quote: An unforgettable evening. The flavors transported me straight to my grandmother's kitchen, yet with a modern twist I never expected.
items.author: Marina S.

items.quote: GASTRONOM is simply the finest dining experience in Belgrade. Every dish is a masterpiece.
items.author: Aleksei P.

items.quote: The ambiance, the service, the food — everything was impeccable. We will return again and again.
items.author: Sofia D.

footer.about: A refined dining experience blending tradition with modern culinary artistry. Every dish tells a story of passion and craft.
